variants.label: Arch — Headless server / container host
variants.description: Vanilla Arch (mainline linux 7.x, DKMS r8125 + broadcom). Containers (podman, docker, distrobox, incus), libvirt+qemu, cockpit web admin. No GPU userland beyond mesa headless.

variants.label: Arch — Headless server + NVIDIA
variants.description: arch-server plus nvidia-open-dkms and CUDA userland. For headless boxes that still need NVIDIA (transcoding, ML, passthrough hosts).

variants.label: Arch — KDE Plasma
variants.description: Vanilla Arch + Plasma 6 desktop with curated daily-driver app set. No NVIDIA, no Steam.

variants.label: Arch — KDE Plasma + NVIDIA
variants.description: arch-kde plus nvidia-open-dkms driver and 32-bit NVIDIA userland.

variants.label: Arch — KDE Plasma + gaming
variants.description: arch-kde plus Steam, gamemode, mangohud, gamescope, lutris, sunshine, Xbox controller (xone).

variants.label: Arch — KDE Plasma + gaming + NVIDIA
variants.description: arch-kde-gaming plus nvidia-open-dkms. Full SteamOS-style switchable gamescope session.

variants.label: Arch — GNOME
variants.description: Vanilla Arch + GNOME Shell with curated app set. GDM, Nautilus, Loupe, Papers. No NVIDIA, no Steam.

variants.label: Arch — GNOME + NVIDIA
variants.description: arch-gnome plus nvidia-open-dkms driver.

variants.label: Arch — GNOME + gaming
variants.description: arch-gnome plus Steam, gamemode, mangohud, gamescope, lutris, sunshine, Xbox controller (xone). No SteamOS session switcher (KDE-only today).

variants.label: Arch — GNOME + gaming + NVIDIA
variants.description: arch-gnome-gaming plus nvidia-open-dkms.

variants.label: CachyOS — Headless server / container host
variants.description: CachyOS bore-lto 7.x kernel with pre-built zfs + r8125 modules. Containers (podman, docker, distrobox, incus), libvirt+qemu, cockpit web admin. No GPU userland beyond mesa headless.

variants.label: CachyOS — Headless server + NVIDIA
variants.description: cachy-server plus pre-built linux-cachyos-bore-lto-nvidia-open. For headless boxes that still need NVIDIA.

variants.label: CachyOS — KDE Plasma
variants.description: CachyOS bore-lto kernel + Plasma 6 desktop with curated daily-driver app set. CachyOS performance tunings + repo packages. No NVIDIA, no Steam.

variants.label: CachyOS — KDE Plasma + NVIDIA
variants.description: cachy-kde plus pre-built linux-cachyos-bore-lto-nvidia-open and 32-bit NVIDIA userland.

variants.label: CachyOS — KDE Plasma + gaming
variants.description: cachy-kde plus Steam, gamemode, mangohud, gamescope, lutris, sunshine, Xbox controller (xone).

variants.label: CachyOS — KDE Plasma + gaming + NVIDIA
variants.description: cachy-kde-gaming plus pre-built linux-cachyos-bore-lto-nvidia-open. Full SteamOS-style switchable gamescope session. The default cache22 desktop image.

variants.label: CachyOS — GNOME
variants.description: CachyOS bore-lto kernel + GNOME Shell with curated app set. GDM, Nautilus, Loupe, Papers.

variants.label: CachyOS — GNOME + NVIDIA
variants.description: cachy-gnome plus pre-built linux-cachyos-bore-lto-nvidia-open.

variants.label: CachyOS — GNOME + gaming
variants.description: cachy-gnome plus Steam, gamemode, mangohud, gamescope, lutris, sunshine, Xbox controller (xone). No SteamOS session switcher (KDE-only today).

variants.label: CachyOS — GNOME + gaming + NVIDIA
variants.description: cachy-gnome-gaming plus pre-built linux-cachyos-bore-lto-nvidia-open.
